column1: # units: spread_decimal and big4_spread_decimal are 0-1 decimals (e.g. 0.21 = 21%); peer_big4_vs_non_bank_ratio is a unitless ratio. definition: peer_big4_vs_non_bank_ratio = median(peer_non_bank values) / median(peer_big4 values)
column2: computed only when both cohorts have >=1 observation. Macquarie (peer_other_major_bank)
column6: and industry bodies are excluded from both medians and listed separately under reference anchors.
